mpu9250_init.tooltip: Create and initialize SparkFun MPU-9250 DMP 9-DoF IMU

mpu9250_set_sensors.message0: MPU-9250 %1 Enable Sensors Accel %2 Gyro %3 Compass %4
mpu9250_set_sensors.tooltip: Select which sensors to enable on MPU-9250

mpu9250_set_gyro_fsr.tooltip: Set MPU-9250 gyroscope full scale range

mpu9250_set_accel_fsr.tooltip: Set MPU-9250 accelerometer full scale range

mpu9250_set_lpf.tooltip: Set MPU-9250 digital low pass filter cutoff frequency

mpu9250_set_sample_rate.tooltip: Set MPU-9250 accel/gyro sample rate (4~1000 Hz)

mpu9250_data_ready.tooltip: Check if MPU-9250 has new accel/gyro data

mpu9250_update.tooltip: Read latest sensor data from MPU-9250 (accel+gyro+compass)
